title: Globe Feature + Multiple locations
excerpt: I work with projects across the globe, which are categorized as an “item”,  and would like to be able to use the GPS function to add multiple locations to one item. Then using the Globe widget would show where one projec…

posts.author: nsolvig (Nicole S. )
posts.cookedHtml: I work with projects across the globe, which are categorized as an “item”, and would like to be able to use the GPS function to add multiple locations to one item. Then using the Globe widget would show where one project is being implemented across multiple countries or regions. Is this possible?
